NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO WANG, JENNY ET AL RETURNED TO COURT INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, LANA O. OU, GUO WEI CHEN, ANISSA CHEN, ANDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, JENNY SUMIDA, VICTORIA OKITA, MARA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00, THE COURT APPORTIONS LIABILITY 90% TO DEFENDANT WANG AND 10% TO DEFENDANT'S VICTORIA SUMIDA AND MARA OKITA AS OPERATORS & OWNERS OF THE VEHICLE. THE COURT JUDGMENT IS BASED ON FOLLOWING DAMAGE AWARD. 1. ANISSA CHEN AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM $1000. 2. ANDY CHEN AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM $1000. 3. LANA CHEN $2000. 4. GUO WEI OU, $3500. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
